fundamentals.name: State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The trust seeks to achieve its investment objective by holding a portfolio of the common stocks that are included in the index (the “Portfolio”), with the weight of each stock in the Portfolio substantially corresponding to the weight of such stock in the index.

news.paragraph: The S&P 500 is on track for its eighth consecutive winning week, driven by an AI rally and positive sentiment surrounding the incoming administration's economic policies. Recent headlines also include political developments such as Tulsi Gabbard's resignation as US intelligence chief and warnings about increased Russian and Chinese spying activities. While the market shows strength, these geopolitical and political events introduce a layer of uncertainty.

headlines.title: Dominic Chu: The Trump Bull Market’s AI Rally Is Powering the S&P 500 Toward an 8th Straight Winning Week
Hassett Backs Incoming Fed Chair Warsh’s Focus on Monetary Policy, Downplays Inflation Risks From Oil Shock
Tulsi Gabbard resigns as Donald Trump’s US intelligence chief
Tulsi Gabbard Resigns as U.S. Intelligence Chief
U.S. Warns of Growing Russian and Chinese Spying in Cuba
